history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. I need to avoid that and instead turn to find a safe route.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_DOWN
</action>

<thought>
I am still at row 02 column B facing right. The cell ahead is lava, so I must change direction. The safe open cell available to move toward is below at row 03 column B, so I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe floor, so the best next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column B is safe floor, and continuing downward keeps me moving through the open corridor toward the lower part of the map.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 05 column B is safe floor, so I should keep moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 06 column B is safe, and continuing down is the only way to advance toward the open area below.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 07 column B is safe, so moving forward keeps me progressing toward the lower corridor and the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 08 column B is safe, so I should move forward to continue toward the goal area.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing down, and the cell ahead at row 09 column B is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The safe path to the goal is to go right along row 08, so I need to turn left to face east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing right. The cell ahead at row 08 column C is lava, so I must not move forward there. The goal is to the right, but the direct path is blocked by lava, so I need to turn to find a safe route.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing down, with a wall directly ahead at row 09 column B. To progress toward the goal, I need to orient toward a safe open cell. Turning left will face me right, but that cell is lava; turning right will face me left, where there is an open floor at row 08 column A? Actually column A is a wall, so that is blocked too. The only immediate safe move available is to adjust orientation first; since both left and right are blocked from here, I should turn right to explore upward on the next step.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing left. The cell ahead is row 08 column A, which is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. The goal is to the right, but row 08 column C is lava, so I need to reorient. Turning left will face me down, but that is also blocked by the wall; turning right will face me up, which leads toward open space and is the safer choice.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 07 column B is safe floor, so the best next step is to move forward toward the open path above.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 06 column B is open floor, so I should continue moving forward along the safe path toward the goal on the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 05 column B is safe floor, and moving upward keeps me on the left-side corridor toward the route to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 04 column B is safe, so I should move forward to continue up the corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 03 column B is safe, and moving forward keeps me progressing toward the upper route.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 02 column B is safe, so the best next step is to continue forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing up, and the cell ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To keep navigating safely, I should turn right to face the open path toward the east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. The safest useful move is to turn downward so I can proceed around the obstacle.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is open floor, so moving forward is safe and gets me closer to the lower passage toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column B is open floor, so I should move forward to continue along the safe left edge toward the lower path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 05 column B is open and safe, and continuing downward keeps me on the left corridor toward the open middle area that leads to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 06 column B is open, and moving there continues toward the only wider safe passage in the middle of the map.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 07 column B is open, so moving forward keeps me progressing down the left side toward the safer open route toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
